output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?hillLabel WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q820334 ; wdt:P1545 wd:Q21481534 ; wdt:P585 ?eventDate ; wdt:P1344 ?prize .
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventDate) = 2018)
  ?event wdt:P633 ?venue .
  ?venue wdt:P119 ?hill .
  ?hill wdt:P31 wd:Q36556 .
  ?prize wikibase:quantityValue ?prizeValue .
  ?hill rdfs:label ?hillLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?hillLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY ASC(?prizeValue)
LIMIT 1
